    Resource Center

    What sets Cedar apart

Your impact starts here

Our healthcare system is in crisis. The explosive rise of high-deductible health plans and under- and uninsured patients means too many Americans cannot afford their care, leaving them to choose between their health or feeding their families, while providers struggle to maintain margins and fulfill their mission of healing.

Cedar’s mission is to empower us all to easily and affordably pursue the care we need.

why join us

Join our mission as we build something transformational

01

We don’t accept a broken system.

We don’t accept that patients should have to choose between care and survival. We don’t accept that providers must navigate outdated systems to stay afloat. We’re building something better, with modern technology at the core.

02

Healthcare is urgent. So is the need for change.

Millions of people delay care because they can’t afford it. Cedar was created to meet this reality with intelligent, ethical AI-powered solutions that adapt, scale, and deliver when it matters most.

03

We don’t just build for clients. We build with them.

We partner deeply, listen carefully, and push thinking forward. Our teams work side by side with clients to co-create solutions, using real-world data and machine learning to improve continuously.

04

One intelligent platform. Endless patient journeys.

Cedar brings together bespoke tools, data, and human-centered design into a single, connected experience. Patients gain clarity and confidence, and providers see measurable, lasting impact.

Our core values

01
Focus on the vision

Commit to the company mission — improving the healthcare financial experience — and prioritize actions that advance that goal.

02
Reject mediocrity

Solicit diverse perspectives, set high standards, challenge assumptions, and raise the bar on thinking and performance.

03
Apply a growth mindset

Stay optimistic, resilient, and curious; embrace difficult problems and learn from setbacks.

04
Use good judgment

Act with accountability, bold thinking, integrity, and practical decision-making.

Culture At Cedar

Hear from Cedarians across teams about what makes our culture special—from how we collaborate and grow to the impact we’re proud to create. Their advice for future teammates? Bring your creativity and expertise to a team uniting providers and patients through innovative technology.

Cedarian Experience Group

Cedarian Experience Group (CEG) is made up of culture champions representative of the broader Cedar population. CEG champions are passionate about maintaining a workplace where everyone can thrive. Our champions represent their colleagues and make suggestions that seek to improve Cedar’s culture, as well as critical investments such as company benefits. This group is shaping the Cedar experience as Cedarians, for Cedarians.

Employee Resource Groups

Cedar is committed to sponsoring spaces where all Cedarians can come together to celebrate their diverse identities, experiences, lifestyles, and skills. Our current slate of employee resource groups has been creating these vital communities within Cedar for years.

Life At Cedar

How We Work

We work in high-trust, high-collaboration environments where ideas can come from anywhere. We keep teams small, focused, and empowered to make meaningful decisions. We value clarity, direct communication, and the willingness to jump in and help one another.

There’s something so exhilarating about being entrusted with solutions that have real world patient experience and financial implications. The ability to collaborate with purpose and empowerment—both with my team and our visionary clients—is exactly why I’ve been here longer than any other company in my career.

Amna Ahmad

VP, Client Management

How We Grow

Growth at Cedar is intentional and people-centered. We emphasize clear expectations and collaborative stretch opportunities that help you build skills, deepen your craft, and grow in ways that matter to you.

I started at Cedar as an individual contributor and grew to lead one of the most dynamic teams I've worked with. On Customer Delight, I operate at the intersection of fast learning, empathy, and mentorship, as engineers rotate in to take on high-impact client work across the stack.With coaching and trust from leadership, the role has stretched me in how I adapt to support others through challenging problem spaces.

Chris Chong

Sr. Software Engineer

Benefits and Wellbeing

We’re proud to offer inclusive, comprehensive benefits that meet the diverse needs of our employees and their families.

Multiple health / dental / vision insurance options to fit your needs

Generous compensation, equity, and 401k matching

Unlimited PTO for vacation, sickness, and mental health

Fertility, family forming, and inclusivity supplemental care and support

16 weeks of 100% fully paid leave for new parents

Remote-friendly team events

Location flexibility: you can work from home or in our NYC headquarters

Continuous learning and development opportunities

Resources for mental and physical wellbeing

Straight from the source

Growth and Opportunity

We believe the best work happens when people feel empowered to learn, experiment, and lead. Growth comes from clear expectations, supportive feedback, and opportunities to take on meaningful problems.

"I spent my first two years at Cedar on the implementation team and now work on the payments team as a first-time PM. My roots in Cedar’s data model from my first role have been an awesome foundation as I get up to speed in the product management world. "

‍

Dickson Cohen

Group Lead, Product Management

"My experience at Cedar has been incredibly fulfilling as it has allowed me to collaborate with exceptional individuals and gain a deeper understanding of the value Cedar offers to our clients." 

LaMonica Shelby

Product Success Specialist

"I spent my first two years at Cedar on the implementation team and now work on the payments team as a first-time PM. My roots in Cedar’s data model from my first role have been an awesome foundation as I get up to speed in the product management world. "

Hanna Feibus

Engineering Director

An award-winning place to work

We’re setting the standard for excellence in company culture.

Be part of a mission that matters

Contact

32 6th Avenue, 18th Floor
New York, NY 10013

Privacy PolicySecurity at CedarTrust Center

Product visuals and descriptions may be in development and are subject to change. Certain functionalities may require third-party integrations or service-specific terms or fees. Patients served, patient interactions, and payments processes represent Cedar cumulative metrics since 2017.  Cedar Support, Cedar Kora, Cedar Cover, and Cedar Intelligence metrics reference data from pilots and surveys from 2024 through 2026. Cedar Pay metrics reference data from 2023 to 2026, including weighted averages. All performance metrics, as well as testimonials from Cedar clients, are provided solely for illustrative purposes, and are not a guarantee of future results.
